title: Susan Tyrrell: My Rotten Life, a Bitter Operetta
original_title: Susan Tyrrell: My Rotten Life, a Bitter Operetta
overview: "It's a little raw and crude right now, but I want this to be 'My Rotten Life' as a dessert, not as a liver pill." Cult film actress Susan Tyrrell (Fat City, Forbidden Zone, Cry-Baby) performing her one woman semi autobiographical musical show at La Cage, Los Angeles, 1992.
